mapping.a_element: wave kinetic equations for the spectral densities of energy (and helicity)
mapping.b_element: Smoluchowski aggregation equation for the mass distribution

mapping.a_element: three-wave interaction / collision term coupling different scales
constant flux of energy through wavenumber scales (Kolmogorov-type cascade)
mapping.b_element: constant flux of mass from small masses to large masses (Kolmogorov-type)

mapping.a_element: stationary Kolmogorov(-Zakharov) power-law energy spectrum solving the kinetic equation
mapping.b_element: stationary Kolmogorov-type mass distribution solving the aggregation equation
exactly computed Kolmogorov constant (same across the kernel family)

mapping.a_element: convergence/locality of the collision integral (Zakharov conformal transformation)
mapping.b_element: locality criterion from the asymptotic properties of the kernel (method of Zakharov transformations)

brief_justification: Both find stationary constant-flux power-law (Kolmogorov / Kolmogorov-Zakharov) solutions of a scale-invariant kinetic/collision equation via the Zakharov transformation, with an exactly computed Kolmogorov constant and a locality condition on the interaction integral; A's three-wave energy cascade in wavenumber maps role-for-role onto B's mass cascade under the aggregation kernel, so the transferable machinery is the same.
